data.title: Societe Generale-FORGE to expand stablecoin to Stellar
data.description:
Societe Generale-FORGE will launch its EUR CoinVertible stablecoin on the Stellar network. SG-FORGE first deployed EURCV on Ethereum and plans expansion to XRP Ledger. Societe Generale-FORGE (SG-FORGE) has announced the expansion of its EUR CoinVertible stablecoin (EURCV) to the Stellar blockchain. The SG-FORGE team launched the EURO-backed in 2023, deploying it on Ethereum. It then […]
The...
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/societe-generale-forge-to-expand-stablecoin-to-stellar/

data.title:
$TOTAL Still sitting on top of its 2021 all time high level.

It has been holding this as support for the past couple of weeks but has failed to push higher so far.

The market is off to the races if this were to break past its recent highs as that'd most likely confirm a new leg…
